title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates:
Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates!
